question: [File: 'File Name: graphql/src/main/resources/graphql/query.graphqls -> Scope: Critical: Network partition caused outside of design parameters'] [Function: account(input: AccountInput!)] Can an unprivileged external user flood the /graphql/alpha endpoint with rapid account(input: {entityId: {num: N}}) queries to push NetworkErrorRatio() above the 0.10 circuit-breaker threshold, causing the Traefik middleware to open the circuit and deny service to all users?
